title: UwUChat
description: UwU Chat is the ultimate plugin for adding a touch of kawaii to your server. Whether you want to spice up your conversations or just spread some wholesome fun, UwU Chat has got you covered!
body:
![uwuchat-banner](https://i.imgur.com/sTZmvH7.png)
UwU Chat is the ultimate plugin for adding a touch of kawaii to your server! Whether you want to spice up your conversations or just spread some wholesome fun, UwU Chat has got you covered. With its customizable chance and a variety of adorable suffixes to choose from, your chat messages will never be the same!

---

Plug and Play

![UwUChat Sample](https://i.imgur.com/vV0QC4s.png)

Just download and put it in your plugins folder.


Soft Dependency
[Brewery plugin](https://github.com/DieReicheErethons/Brewery/). - Get UwU'ed while drunk.

---

Commands

    /uwuchatreload - Reloads the configuration of the plugin
    /uwuchattoggle - Lets players turn the UwUChat on and off whenever they want.

---

Config
```
# UwUChat
# UwU Kaomoji https://cutekaomoji.com/characters/uwu/

# Translation chances based on player permissions (0-100)
high-translation-chance: 50
medium-translation-chance: 25
low-translation-chance: 10

translation-chance: 25
suffixes:
  - "~"
  - "(◡ ω ◡)"
  - "(⑅˘꒳˘)"
  - "Uwu"
  - "uwU"
  - "ÚwÚ"
  - "uwu"
  - "☆w☆"
  - "✧w✧"
  - "♥w♥"
  - "(˘ᵕ˘)"

# Translation color (format: "&x" where x is a color code or color name)
translation-color: "&d"

# List of commands to run when a player sends a UwU message
uwu-commands:
  - "give %player% cookie 1"

brewery-hook: true
```
---

Need Support? Join our discord server!
